nodes.title: Register Now for the January 25th Charity Texas Poker Tournament – Over $40,000 in Prizes
The PM Group Turns 30: SA YES – Supplying Childhood Success
The PM Group and Our Clients Help SA YES Provide 23,000 San Antonio Area Children with Back-to-School Supplies

pageContext.content:
The Drive Away 4 Education Truck Raffle sponsored by Ancira Auto Group begins this week!
 

 
All proceeds benefit SA YES, an organization that raises funds to give students and community groups in San Antonio needed educational support with school supplies and grants throughout Bexar County. Each year, SA YES selects numerous elementary schools in San Antonio and supplies every student in those schools with a free packet of school supplies. These school supplies give children in title one elementary schools the basics they need to excel in class. This year, SA YES plans to give out supplies to 26,000 children in San Antonio!
 
The deadline to enter the raffle is August 13th at News4SA.com and FoxSanAntonio.com.  A live drawing will be held during the 10 o’clock news on WOAI Wednesday, August 16th.
 
The PM Group has been the agency of record for SA YES for 20 years.
 
 
 
About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. Over the past 30 years, the agency has continued to grow and is currently listed as San Antonio’s Largest Advertising Agency by the San Antonio Business Journal. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala every February that to date has raised over $2.5 million for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years!  It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
